acceptance_results.criterion: notification-worker compose env includes local Postgres host, port, user, password, database, and sslmode=disable.
Targeted notification-worker smoke starts worker and metrics.
No service source, dependency, vendor, package, frontend, credential, or schema files changed.

blockers: Notification worker dispatcher logs missing message_outbox after startup because the compose DB has not applied subscription-external message cadence migrations.
Acquisition API still exits during admin schema bootstrap because products/userbase base tables are missing in the empty compose DB.
Postback dispatcher still targets localhost DB in compose runtime.
cleanup_notes: Targeted compose project was stopped with docker compose down -v --remove-orphans.
Temporary shared-network was removed when this smoke created it.
Temporary Docker auth files were removed by shell trap.

Ran targeted notification-worker compose smoke; worker remained running and logged worker plus metrics startup.
Recorded downstream missing message_outbox schema as a separate blocker.
known_gaps: message_outbox schema provisioning is still required for successful dispatcher polling.
Provider delivery/live-flow verification still requires real env/provider values.
Acquisition and postback-dispatcher runtime blockers remain.

Missing message_outbox is a schema provisioning issue and was not changed in this compose-only slice.
summary: Notification worker compose DB env fixed and startup verified.
